loop1.title: Thermal Life
loop1.note: Showing Load Factor, Active Power, and Apparent Power as thermal stress proxies — no temperature sensors or nameplate ratings are available for this asset.

loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: Thermal sensors (hotspot, oil, winding) are not measured by this asset; showing available power data as a proxy for loading context.

loop1.title: Life & Capacity
loop1.note: Showing total active power as a proxy for loading percentage — per-phase power and nameplate ratings aren't measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Insulation Aging & Loss of Life
loop1.note: Showing projected aging/loss-of-life metrics derived from active power load (active_power_total_kw) — direct thermal/aging sensors (hotspotC, FAA) are not measured for this asset.
